notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes a large-scale battle scene (黑铁生 fighting multiple opponents) with ordinary visible combat events. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the source material. The events are all publicly observable combat actions. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted that meets the criteria.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes combat events (黑铁生 fighting multiple opponents) without revealing internal motives. Observed actions are purely tactical combat behaviors (attacking, defending, pursuing, retreating). No direct source evidence supports any inferred motive beyond 'fighting to defend/survive', which is too generic. No character expresses goals, desires, fears, or strategic reasoning. Returning empty characterMotives.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
黑家（黑家蛊仙/黑家太上大长老）是明确的集体 faction，出现在种子中。黑铁生作为黑家首领率众防守铁鹰福地第二防线，正魔蛊仙联手进攻，黑家凭借地利和荒兽合鸣鹰防守。黑铁生转战四方后仙元耗尽，黑家太上大长老等七人出现。黑家面临多方围攻的防守压力是源支持的。
IF export filter quarantined 10 legacy old-schema branches.
